title: Software for Ground Systems
chapter_title: Ground Data Systems and Mission Operations

data.Type of Product: Software commands and telemetry data processor handling formatting and interface conversion. Full support for NSA Type 1 crypto, AES encryption/decryption and CCSDS data links.
Software that performs data formatting and interface conversion for commands and telemetry, with full support for NSA Type 1 and AES encryption/decryption devices.
Open-source software that tracks satellites and provides orbit prediction in real-time. Radio and antenna rotator control for autonomous tracking.
Free software development toolkit that provides signal processing blocks to implement software- defined radios and signal processing systems.
Ground station control program with an automation software package.
CPU-based software modem for telemetry, telecommand, and payload data over UHF–L-band links, featuring integrated mission scheduling and transmission sequence control.
